name: Millet Bread- Pan-1
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients (except liquids and yeast) inside the bread pan.
2. Add liquid ingredients: water, butter, molasses, and dry yeast to the bread pan.
3. Close the cover.
4. Insert the dry yeast into the yeast holder.
5. Select WHOLE WHEAT BAKE MODE.
6. Press start. The timer will display 5:00 minutes.
